name: VERDANT VEGETABLE COUSCOUS with SPICY MUSTARD GREENS

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons plus 2 teaspoons extra-virgin olive oil
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons plus 2 teaspoons extra-virgin olive oil

ingredients.item: 1¾ cups vegetable stock, homemade or store-bought
ingredients.original: 1¾ cups vegetable stock, homemade or store-bought

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons Spicy Mustard Greens, plus more for serving
ingredients.original: 3 tablespoons Spicy Mustard Greens, plus more for serving

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon plus ¾ teaspoon coarse sea salt
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon plus ¾ teaspoon coarse sea salt

ingredients.item: 1 pound thin asparagus, ends trimmed, tips removed, and stalks cut into ¼-inch-thick slices
ingredients.original: 1 pound thin asparagus, ends trimmed, tips removed, and stalks cut into ¼-inch-thick slices

ingredients.item: 8 ounces broccolini, sliced ¼ inch thick
ingredients.original: 8 ounces broccolini, sliced ¼ inch thick
